---
title: "Awarded the Minciencias National PhD Scholarship"
description: "Selected for Colombia's National PhD Scholarship (Call 933) from Minciencias to pursue a PhD in Mechanical Engineering at Universidad del Norte."
date: "2024-08-01"
categories: [news]
image: "/files/images/news/scholarship.jpg"
---

I was awarded the **National PhD Scholarship (Call 933)** from Minciencias to pursue my PhD in Mechanical Engineering at Universidad del Norte, focusing on energy systems modeling and the low-carbon transition.
